title: GateFPS
description: Lightweight, vanilla-friendly ModPack focused on maximizing FPS and performance for Minecraft 1.21 and above.
body:
GateFPS is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly performance ModPack built to maximize FPS in Minecraft 1.21+.
It includes powerful optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight to deliver smoother gameplay without changing the classic look and feel.

Perfect for low-end PCs, multiplayer servers, or anyone wanting a clean and fast experience — no visual changes, no bloat, just pure performance.

Install and play. Your FPS does the rest.
